'''Auyemesh''' was one of three [[Moon/Legends|moons]] orbiting [[Almania]] in the [[Almanian system]].

==History==
[[Kueller]] killed most of the population using the Force, following a similar genocide on [[Pydyr]].

{{Moon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Auyemesh is misspelled as "Auremesh" in ''Vortex'', with possible confusion relating to the name of the [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] language.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Vortex (audiobook)}}
